examples: His memory was becoming shockingly bad.
Shockingly, this useless and dangerous surgery did not end until the 1930s.
More shockingly, these products are often advocated by very slim models.
Shockingly, one in five companies globally said they had no innovation strategy at all.
Shockingly, only 1 in 5 workers eligible for Commuter Accounts takes advantage of this money-saving benefit.
